(Sections 6-9)
Exploring The Gap
MODULE 4
Workbook & Example Pack

-- 1 of 28 --

-1-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
What You’re Coaching:
In slaughtering the sacred cows:
Self-Forgiveness through an emotionally compelling / intellectually
satisfying “why it’s not your fault”
Diagnosis for the symptoms experienced in the MOHT
A void in belief / momentary disorientation / receptivity.
Renewed energy and excitement to fill it.
In belief installation:
Empowerment and renewed optimism
The gift of revelation or insight aka “aha moments”.
Prescriptive beliefs/actions that enable MOHP
Seed a blue ocean solution that satisfies those new beliefs/agreements
How to Write it:
Sourced from:
Launch Bible (Section 4)
1. List Builder’s Lab 2.0 by Amy Porterfield
The 5 Reasons You’re Still Stuck With a Chronic Case of “List Envy”
(and how to snap out of it right now)
Section 6 - Slaughtering Sacred Cows
& Belief Installation
Examples:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 28 --

-2-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
Reason #1: You’re Overwhelmed and Distracted By All the Tactics &
Strategies
Let me guess:
You started this whole list building thing with a fully loaded Starbucks card
and a full tank of motivation.
But 87 macchiatos and a fresh patch of grey hair later…
And you’re still right where you started.
You got lost in “all the things”... all at once.
… What kind of lead magnet should I create?
… What kind of pop-ups should I install on my blog - and where do I put
them?
… How do I connect it to my Drip or ConvertKit account? And what happens
next? Should I send a welcome email? A full nurture sequence? How many
emails? What about pivoting to my product or sales funnel?
… What about running fb ads? Guest posting? Challenges? Instagram Sto-
ries? Snapchat? Content Upgrades?
Ugh. As I said…
All. The. Things.
And they all have their place.
But it’s in knowing the right sequence these strategies must be executed
upon -- and how to tackle them with complete confidence that allows you to
grow your list every single day.
What you need:
Confidence to double down on a super clear, “first do this, then do that” list
building strategy that gives you visible momentum and unwavering motiva-
tion to keep stacking up the list building wins.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 28 --

-3-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
Reason #2: You’re A Permanent Resident of Tech Hell
You didn’t choose to move here.
In fact, when you got started, you were fully committed to “keeping it
simple” and not falling prey to the infamous “shiny object syndrome”.
But as you struggled to gain traction with your list building efforts, those
shiny objects started looking more… umm... shiny.
So you plunked down on the annual plans of every new software that came
your way.
Page builders, email automation software, cart software, webinar software,
countdown timers, etc.
You’re all tech’d up, with nowhere to go…
And no idea how to tie together this intricate web of software and systems
that you now have in your arsenal.
What you need:
To leverage a small but powerful stack of inexpensive list building tools --
and to allow yourself to be meticulously guided in their most effective imple-
mentations, instead of forcing yourself to become a black belt tech ninja
overnight.
Reason #3: Sporadic is Your Middle Name
An epic blog post here.
A social media post with 100 “likes” there.
Maybe a facebook ad campaign or a 10 day challenge if you’re feeling extra
frisky.
You’ve tried a bunch of things -- maybe even got a bit of traction.
Unfortunately, you’ve never stayed committed to a strategy long enough for
it to produce a steady stream of email subscribers.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 28 --

-4-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
Growing an email list has less to do with capitalizing on short, inconsistent
bursts of inspiration -- and everything to do with committing to a consistent
and predictable list building system.
I didn’t grow my email list to over 250,000 strong with booming home run
swings followed by long periods of radio silence.
I doubled down on the fundamentals, chipped away with determination,
and made sure that I was growing my company’s most important asset
every single day.
What you need:
A consistent content creation and promotional strategy for bringing in a
flood of leads onto your email list every single day without fail.
Reason #4: Being Afraid of Paid Traffic
I get it.
Investing in FB Ads can feel like a bit of a gamble.
But secretly, you also know that facebook ads can be the shortcut to waking
up next month to 1,000 new people on your email list who want to hear
more about your offer and how they can grab it.
That is, if you know how to do it right.
The thing is… you’re not afraid of smartly investing in paid ads.
You’re afraid of making bad bets and having to explain to your partner why
you just stuffed Zuckerberg’s levis with a stack of hard-earned bills and have
nothing to show for it.
What you need:
You need to know how to make smart bets with facebook ads. How to get
the most mileage from a tiny budget that can significantly skyrocket your list
growth, while giving you the speedpass to growing an asset you KNOW
you’ll be primed to cash in on with a strong offer and sales funnel down the
line.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 28 --

-5-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
Reason #5: You’re Still Building an “Email List”
I’m gonna come right out and say it.
There’s a huge difference between building an email list and building a prof-
itable email list of soon-to-be buyers,
And being aware of this crucial distinction informs every decision you make.
From the type of lead magnet you create to the automated sales funnels
and email follow up sequences you use to engage your new leads in the
days and weeks following the opt-in.
Most gurus will tell you “the money is in the list”.
Better-informed experts will correct them and say “the money is in your
relationship to the list”.
But the truth is…
The money is in your subscriber’s relationship to the problem they’re
trying to solve.
And unless your lead magnet, sales funnels, and subsequent messaging
confirms and reinforces that relationship, chances are it won’t lead to
money changing hands
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 28 --

-6-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
What you need to know:
Your job isn’t to simply build an email list. It’s to build a list of future buyers.
The Good News Is….
2. 10x Launches by Ry Schwartz
5 Things You Gotta Understand RIght Now if you Wanna Survive the
“Execution Crisis and Have Record-Breaking, “Let’s fly the entire team
out to Tulum to celebrate” Product Launches in 2018 and Beyond
1. Launch & Funnel Copy ≠ Regular Copy
Launch copy has far less to do with memorizing formulas, secret triggers or
pushy persuasion tricks, and EVERYTHING to do with helping your prospects
engineer a new reality where your product makes perfect sense.
We’re not so much “selling” your product as we are coaching the transfor-
mation between Point A and Point Buyer…
… and then using email copy as the means to activate the new beliefs, atti-
tudes and re-shifts that move your prospect beyond the buying line and
into your Teachable or Thinkific dashboard.
2. It’s meant to be written fast.
Funnels in 2018 are like rabid, insatiable teenagers with costco-sized appe-
tites for email copy.
The more buckets or segments you have, the more emails you’re gonna
need.
The more upsells, downsells, or subsequences you have, the more sleepless
nights you’ll spend cozying up to a google doc.
It’s not uncommon for your funnel to demand 15, 30 or even 60 emails.
So it goes with saying that you need to put a supersized emphasis on SPEED
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 28 --

-7-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
Cause as a coach, course creator, online entrepreneur, or even as a busy ass
copywriter, you don’t have endless hours to labor over your Macbook Pro
while throwing back 18 Starbucks refills.
Screw those Starbucks reward points.
Your copywriting needs to happen quickly.
But it also needs to perform like crazy.
Which means, you need to take a strategic, straight-line approach that maxi-
mizes your R.O.T. (Return on Time) while still producing stellar, predictable
results.
You see…
You ain’t afraid of writing email copy…
You’re afraid of wasting what little time you have on doing it poorly.
You’re afraid of “getting it wrong”...
And worse…. wasting your time getting it wrong.
And that’s why you go for the presumably simple fix of hiring someone to do
it for you.
Only to find that that your budget can afford maybe 0.5 emails…
Or the 3 week lead time you thought “should be good enough” doesn’t even
crack a tenth of a good copywriter’s wait list.
So here’s where you swallow the pill, and finally accept that…
3. It’s meant to be written by you (at least partially)
Simply put, if you’re responsible for generating revenue in your business,
you’re responsible for taking ownership over your launch copy.
And the process isn’t supposed to suck.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 28 --

-8-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
Writing launch copy, and launch emails in particular can and should be one
of the most rewarding and exciting tasks in your business.
Heck, it’s the most intimate thing you can do with your audience with your
pants still on.
And if you’re still not taking at least partial ownership of this critical, 1K/hour
task, you’re essentially straight jacketing your business and deferring
responsibility to a member of the only remaining profession where it’s still
cool to drink before noon.
Sure, at some point there may be a time where you’re in a position to bring
in a talented (and sometimes sober) copywriter to help shoulder the load.
But if you haven’t even achieved minimum viable mastery over the craft,
how will you know if what you’re getting is even good?
How will you know you didn’t just spend 15K on a flaming piece of sh*t that
couldn’t sell a 20 year single malt to Don Draper?
So ya..
Deep breaths.
I know it’s not what you wanted to hear.
But here’s why it ain’t so bad for you…
4. You don’t need to have studied direct response for 10 years
Cause here’s the truth - you don’t have time to hone your skills for years
before getting results.
You’re launching products and funnels right now.
You can’t treat copywriting as some isolated skill that you only get to drag
into your funnel or product launch later.
You need to cultivate your copy chops as an integrated part of your launch-
es and funnels.
Not an isolated one.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 9 of 28 --

-9-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
So we’re not going to ask you to wake up at 5am every morning for the next
60 days to sketch out old sales letters by hand or read a 300 page tome
from some guy who died 50 years ago.
You don’t need overarching mastery
You don’t need to earn an ugly mug that says “world’s best copywriter”
Hell… if you want the mug that badly, I’ll just give you mine.
But what you DO need is to gain OUTCOME BASED MASTERY over the most
critical skill-set for selling more programs, automating your profits, and put-
ting this whole online business thing on rapid scale up mode.
And you need to do it all without deviating too far away from your natural
talents or “zone of genius”.
That’s why…
5. You must leverage your existing talents as a coach or educator to
engineer massively profitable product launches.
Ever wonder why some of the world’s most legendary copywriters and mar-
keters (think Robert Collier, Maxwell Martz, and Napoleon Hill ) were also
personal growth badasses (aka coaches)?
Here’s why:
Copywriting has nothing to do with wordsmithing, magical phrases, or
“secret” trigger words that I’ll only tell you if you buy “copywriting guru
secrets for dumb people” by 11:59 pm tonight.
Copywriting is nothing but the art of recognizing WHO your prospect must
become by the end of the funnel…
… and then strategically coaching the behaviors, actions, attitudes, beliefs
and reframes to help them become that perfect buyer with as little friction
as possible.
Nothing more.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 10 of 28 --

-10-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
Nothing less.
The truth is…
A skilled coach or educator will ALWAYS stand a better chance at getting a
conversion than a skeezy salesman.
As long as you know how to properly leverage those skills of yours.
3. Indestructible Team by SoulPowered:
Here are 6 liberating truths you MUST awaken to right now if you want to
“work on your business”, scale up sustainably, and experience more
fist-bump worthy wins in the next 12 weeks than you did all of last year
Myth #1 - Team Building” is an HR Function:
False.
Maybe traditional team building was an HR function…
But not for a modern team (virtual or live) that you’re counting on to power
your company’s growth while removing you from the nitty gritty.
If you treat your humans as a “resource”, you’re setting yourself up for fail-
ure.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 11 of 28 --

-11-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
If you treat your team as an appreciable ASSET, you’ll be positioned to treat
each key hire as an asset that appreciates with time and produces direct,
measurable results to your bottom line.
In short - building your team is inseparable from growth and scale.
Myth #2: Growth is a Function of Marketing & Sales
Yes.
But the power and capacity to execute your marketing, is a function of
TEAM… and more specifically, a resilient, empowered, and functional-
ly-aligned one.
You need a team to build those projects, execute on time, and consistently
perform at an elite level.
Growing through marketing without first investing in the right TEAM to exe-
cute it is why you feel like you’re in constant sprint mode -- wasting precious
time and energy WORRYING about whether stuff is actually getting done,
and going into scramble mode when you realize that the freelancer you just
hired on Upwork would rather sip mojitos on the playa, than custom code
your new landing page.
Myth #3: Scaling is Supposed to Be Hard, Scary & Costly.
Challenging? Sure.
But if you buy into the notion that you need to sacrifice the best years of
your life in order to grow your company, you’re selling yourself (and your
team) way short.
Scale DOESN'T have to come at the expense of profitability.
Your team doesn’t need to be “crippling overhead” that keeps you up at
night and makes you shield your eyes from the monthly balance sheet.
When properly sourced, onboarded, and led, your team can have instant
impact and positive ROI, all while serving as the scaffolding and support
system needed to scale up in a sustainable way that doesn’t pull you away
from the life you want to live.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 12 of 28 --

-12-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
Myth #4: I’m not a leader. I need to hire someone to do it for me:
You can’t outsource “leadership” -- nor can it be found on p.24 of that best-
seller Amazon just drone-shipped to your door.
To work ON your business (instead of in it) requires a whole new skillset and
mindset.
Most entrepreneurs and executives don’t have these skills right “out of the
box”.
As a woman, you have the DNA and makeup to be an exceptional leader,
but you’re not expected to know how to harness and activate it from Day 1.
Team Building and Leadership aren’t soft skills that you can just “wing on
the fly”.
There’s a measurable and predictable approach to building teams that allow
you to rapidly scale.
Myth #5: I could patch my team together with VA’s and contractors to
save money.
Tesla wasn’t built on Upwork.
Google didn’t hire its coders on Fiverr.
Apple didn’t crowdsource it’s C-Suite on a FB thread.
In short, NO high-growth company or business has ever been built on the
foundations of a patchworked team of freelancers, contractors and VA’s.
They all have their place.
But unless you’re running a small online blog as a side hustle, this approach
won’t cut it.
Real businesses require REAL TEAMS.
And an ambitious, high-growth company needs an Indestructible one.
Myth #6: I can’t afford to build a high-performing team UNTIL I get bigger.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 13 of 28 --

-13-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
Wrong.
You literally can’t afford to build a low-performing, unengaged, uncommit-
ted team of 10 people marching to their own beat.
If you’re scaling, and have plans to make a bigger impact while maintaining
your sanity, you can’t afford NOT to have a team supporting your every
move.
A high-performing team isn’t something you invest in once you’re “big
enough”.
It’s HOW you get to that point in the first place.
4. Funnels That Scale by Greg Hickman
4 Funnel-Killing Myths You Need To Put Into a UFC grade headlock.
1. “Funnel Hacking” as a shortcut to success:
I’ll admit.
It’s a seductive term.
But copying an existing funnel and thinking you’ll get the same results (do
you even really know how the funnel you’re copying is performing?) is a
surefire way to create a franken-funnel that’s dead on arrival.
It rejects ALL the nuances that make it work (aka. your audience, your own
messaging and brand strategy, your USP, etc.) and makes the false pre-
sumption that the success of a funnel is purely mechanical.
Here’s the deal:
Your funnel is gonna be the backbone of your business -- aka the backbone
of your financial success - aka the backbone of the lifestyle you’re able to
create for you and your family.
There is no “hack” for that.
“Funnel Hacking” is nothing but a seductive shortcut that ends up
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 14 of 28 --

-14-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
compromising the “secret sauce” of what really makes a funnel work -- you.
The good news is, as you’ll soon see, there are BETTER and more effective
shortcuts for getting your high-performing funnel up and running fast.
2. Advanced marketing automation and funnel strategy is only for the
big boys and gals:
Newsflash: They were all small once. Maybe even smaller than you.
Funnel automation isn’t something you do once you become “big”. It’s how
you become big in the first place.
All the rockstars I’ve worked with - John Lee Dumas, Jasmine Star, Pat Flynn,
Betty Rocker, etc. scaled up and achieved the “holy grail” of online business
by doing exactly what you’re going to be shown how to replicate on the
other side of the page.
3. Scaling is something you do later:
Let me guess - at some point in your entrepreneurial career, some Gary Vee
wannabee told you to “just ship it”.
To start simple -- and scale later.
So you went against your better judgement.
A better judgement that told you:
“hold up, maybe I should be more strategic and meticulous about this thing
and build a foundation for long-term, profitable growth”
When you “just ship it” you build a business with the DNA programmed for a
3 week lifespan aka the life of a sad little fruit fly picking up table scraps.
But when you build with scale in mind like I’ll show you (including your tag-
ging architecture, how to capture data on an ongoing basis, and squeeze the
most ROI out of EVERY lead that comes into your business)...
You build your business with the DNA engineered for high 6 and even 7-fig-
ures… and ultimately one that is SO well organized, simple to run, and
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 15 of 28 --

-15-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
automated that you actually get first-hand experience of this “mythical”
freedom thing everyone likes to rave about.
4. 90% of Businesses Fail:
Repeat the following 10X fast.
90% of businesses don’t fail - but 90% of the systems they use do.
With the proven automations and funnel strategies you’ll have up and run-
ning in your business by this time next month, you will have automatically
tipped the scales to become one of VERY few online businesses with the
intelligence, structural integrity and foundation for sustainable, long-term
growth.

What You’re Coaching:
Buy-in on your method/solution/IP before making the offer (pre-frame)
A solution that uniquely (and exclusively) satisfies the beliefs/
agreements from Section 6.
How to Write it:
[Introduce Your IP/Method/System WITHOUT making an offer yet]
[List out the MOHP benefits that they’ll enjoy as a result of using it]
1. List Builder’s Lab 2.0 by Amy Porterfield:
Growing a Profitable Email List of Future Buyers Is Easier (and More
Critical) Than Ever
If you’ve made it this far, you ALREADY know that building a powerful email
list of eager buyers is critical to the success of you and your business.
No need to remind you of that :)
But maybe you didn’t know that by building your email list using the 3-Step
Stacking Method that I’m about to share with you, you’ll also have the
power to:
Quickly validate new products BEFORE spending hundreds of hours
creating it.
Enjoy substantial cash windfalls just by matching your audience to
existing programs that match their needs (otherwise known as Joint
Venture partnerships).
Have the solid foundation to start profiting from all those exciting and
powerful strategies you keep hearing about (webinars, funnels, surveys,
Section 7 - The Blue Ocean Bridge
Examples:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-17-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
joint ventures, etc.)
Attract higher profile guests and influencers for your podcast or blog
that can help you grow your reach even faster.
Possess a powerful and consistently growing asset that can literally
generate revenue on demand.
Answer with confidence when potential partners or collaborators ask
you: “How many people do you have on your list?”.
YES, these outcomes are totally within reach for you and your business
(whether you’re starting from scratch or hitting reset for the 10th time)...
… but they DO depend on taking a straight line, step-by-step approach.
One that leverages only the most current, proven, and fresh-for-2017 list
building strategies while dodging all those sharp shiny objects that constant-
ly rip a hole through your momentum.
One that’s been my secret weapon for bringing in over 5,000 fresh leads
onto my list every single month without any super complicated ninja stuff
that takes a swat team of marketing professionals and tech gurus to pull off.
And…
One that you’ll excitedly point back to a few weeks from now when you hit
“refresh” on your email provider dashboard, and have hundreds of high-
ly-engaged leads staring back at you.
And if you’re still with me, then I couldn’t be more excited to introduce you
to my FULLY REVAMPED signature list building system…
2. 10x Launches by Ry Schwartz:
The Most Profitable Question You’ll Ever Ask
Ever stop to wonder why a skilled coach or consultant can boast a 20-50%
conversion rate on enrollment calls while online marketing sputters out at
2-5%?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 18 of 28 --

-18-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
What is it about that special dynamic that is 10X more effective than what
most online entrepreneurs and course creators so readily accept?
And more importantly (and lucratively)...
How can we start bridging that 10X gap at scale?
The Coaching the Conversion Method™
That’s the biggest question I had circling around my grey matter as I was
developing the Coaching The Conversion Method™.
Traditional tactics like countdown timers, and superficial urgency have taken
us to the point where we can get *decent* conversions…
(albeit at the expense of alienating our audience and feeling like total ass-
holes)
But what if we saw ourselves NOT as marketers that had to scare our pros-
pects into the final sale…
But as conversion coaches or profit engineers tasked with creating a new
reality, a new set of beliefs, and a series of micro-actions that made buying
your product feel like a natural next step?
What if we treated a “sale” not as an isolated thing that occurs in a silo..
But as the predictable end point once you’ve effectively coached the
transformation between Point A and Point Buyer?
And what if…
As a coach, consultant or educator, you were ALREADY equipped with the
prerequisite skills for leading your prospect down that path?
Coaching The Conversion™ is a COMPLETE, step-by-step system for:
1. Amplifying the conversion potential of ANY funnel or system
you’re currently using.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 19 of 28 --

-19-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
2. Knowing exactly what type of message to send at what stage of
your funnel to guide your prospect along the buyer’s journey…
meaning, no more staring at your macbook screen wondering “what
the hell am I’m s’posed to write here”
3. Going beyond the need for superficial scarcity tricks and “OMFG
we’re closing in 10 minutes” urgency tactics… and instead, naturally
and ethically coaching your prospects into enthusiastic, “take my
money now” buyers.
4. Leveraging your existing skills as a coach or educator so that you
don’t have to shoehorn yourself into a role that never quite felt right.
5. Executing your evergreen funnels and product launches with
more speed, clarity, and profit.
Cause here’s the thing…
You don’t want to feel powerless over the most critical and profitable func-
tion of your business.
You literally can’t afford to.
But you also can’t afford to labor for hours in front of the screen while the
rest of your business goes neglected.
Or worse… send bad launch emails that repel customers instead of attract
them.
Now, you no longer have to.
3. Indestructible Team by SoulPowered:
If you think that building a team is an expense, you’re doing it wrong
Because when you engineer an Indestructible Team™ for freedom, scale,
and impact the way we’re about to show you, you’ll finally…
Get back 10-20 hours per week and free yourself up to be the
VISIONARY LEADER of your company instead of a glorified employee.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-20-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
Never cancel a lunch date, yoga session or weekend retreat again to
put out a fire caused by an unengaged team member who probably
won’t last till next month.
Scale up your impact and income in a sustainable way that FEELS good
and is fully aligned with the vision you have for yourself and your
company.
Feel supported, cared for, and uplifted by a team of A-players who are
EQUALLY bought into your mission and committed to carrying it out.
Get a potent taste of this whole “freedom” thing everyone likes to rave
about… and more importantly, leverage your newfound energy and
excitement to breath life into new projects and opportunities.
An indestructible team is the scaffolding and business support structure
that allows you to dream bigger, scale faster and make a bigger impact…
All while feeling like the confident, creative, in-control CEO or business
leader you were born to be.
It takes more than “just a team”...
it takes an Indestructible Team™
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 21 of 28 --

-21-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
In the tsunami of change, rapidly cycling economies, emerging business
models, and a shortage of labor, building a strong team is simply not
enough.
You need a team that is tribal and indestructible.
Indestructible teams have members with the personal and collective
capabilities and spirit to move forward with extreme engagement and
goal achievement; despite obstacles or setbacks.
Indestructible teams are possessed with relentless dedication to their
goals, each other, and their culture.
Indestructible Teams are more than a team. They are a tribe; believing
in the infinite potential of how they will make history, not because they
are competing with others, but because they are driven by cause.
Ultimately an Indestructible Team™ can sustain and scale themselves
and business results without their leader; giving leaders like you the
power and freedom of choice.
Write Your Blue Ocean Bridge:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 22 of 28 --

-22-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
What You’re Coaching:
Trust (in you to deliver results)
Through mentioning past experience/clients as it relates to the big
promise.
Through giving a quick glimpse into your personal life/tastes/habits.
Through your method/process
Through taking a stand against common enemies.
How to Write It:
Sourced from:
67 Questions (Sections 3 and 4)
1. Funnels That Scale by Greg Hickman:
Who The Heck Am I To Tell You This?
Whatsup!
Greg Hickman here.
And when I’m not “serenading” my beautiful wife, Sarah, son, Cole, and dog,
Koda with the best of old school 90’s hip hop…
I run System.ly - a funnel strategy and automation agency that has worked
behind the scenes, engineering 6 and 7 figure campaigns for some of the
rockstars you look up to:
People like: John Lee Dumas, Chris Ducker, Jasmine Star, Betty Rocker, etc.
Section 8 - Solidifying Beliefs Part 1 (Your Bio)
Examples:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-23-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
We are not:
Info Marketers
Funnel Hackers
Overpriced “let me tell you what to do but now how to do it” business
consultants
We are hardcore implementation specialists & next level funnel strate-
gists that pick you up on the side of the thorny back roads that those other
folks left you off at…
And if you allow me to do it, here’s where I plan on taking you and your
business:
2. 10x Launches by Ry Schwartz:
Meet The Original “Conversion Coach”
More reclusive than Salinger on a rainy day, Ry Schwartz has been deep in
the trenches for over a dozen 6 and 7-figure product launches and ever-
green funnels.
When he’s not sipping single malts, writing screenplays, or trying to under-
stand why people keep losing their shit over Stranger Things, he’s on “air-
plane mode”, writing or consulting with top online entrepreneurs, experts
and educators like Amy Porterfield, Todd Herman, Josh Shipp and Dan
Martell.
And he’s done it all without writing a single line of “copy”.
Instead, he developed the Coaching The Conversion Method™ as a faster,
more natural and intuitive framework for crafting launch copy that connects
deeply with your prospects, and “coaches” them into being the perfect
buyer.
Meaning, you get to enjoy more profitable, value-driven relationships with
your clients instead of feeling like a greased up, second hand Sham-Wow
dealer everytime you hit “send”.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 24 of 28 --

-24-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
Write Your Bio: 	www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 25 of 28 --

-25-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
What You’re Coaching:
Trust (in their ability to generate results with your help)
Through identifying with past success stories (using their story as a
proxy).
Through recognizing a common starting point (MOHT, bleeding neck
pain points).
Through an exciting, OEP result.
How to Write It:
Basic Structure:
[Bleeding neck pain points MOHT before hiring you (or your product)]
[Tipping Point / Precursor to Hiring You (or Your Product)]
[Results of Decision to Work With You]
Prompts for Client Testimonials:
1. Can you explain what you were experiencing in regards to (the problem)
before hiring me?
2. What was the specific tipping point that made you realize you needed
help?
3. What have been the specific results of our work together? What have
been some unexpected benefits/wins? What aspect of our work together
made the biggest difference for you?
Section 9 - Solidifying Beliefs Part 2
(Testimonials aka the “Client Proxy”)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 26 of 28 --

-26-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
1. 10x Launches by Ry Schwartz (for Avatar 1 - Experts/Course Creators)
"I always struggled to make my launch emails do all the things they needed
to do. I wanted to get the word out and encourage people to purchase our
courses, but I also didn't want to sound (or feel) like a sleazy marketer or
drive people crazy.
After one phone call with Ryan, I knew I never wanted to do another launch
without him. I think he might be a mind-reader.
Not only did he make the process streamlined and fun for me (I always used
to dread writing these things,) but his immense well of empathy makes him
the absolute BEST collaborator. On top of that, he helped me to find my
voice - now I'm proud of the emails we send out leading up to a launch
because students love them.
I actually get thank you notes from my list when I send out a note I've
worked on with Ryan. "That's exactly what I needed to hear!" or "This is
exactly what I'm going through - thank you so much!"
Ryan is THE BEST. I am WAY more confident about my copy, and serve many
more students as a direct result of working with him."
Kelsey Kaufman, Owner, Green Tea Productions
Examples:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 27 of 28 --

-27-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
2. 10x Launches by Ry Schwartz (for Avatar 2 - Copywriters/Growth
Marketers)
Ryan’s a deadly sharp copywriter and a fantastic teacher. Early in my career,
I remember being ambitious, motivated, and completely overwhelmed.
There were so many copywriting books, techniques, formulas, methods- you
can spend years reading & studying without ever actually working towards
mastery of the skill!
The strategies Ryan shared with me at the beginning of my journey saved
me at least 3-5 years of guesswork and fumbling around- that’s invaluable to
me. Our conversations since have only further sharpened my writing and
processes. Without a doubt, working with Ryan was the best investment I’ve
made in my writing career.
Kingshuk Mukherjee, Director of Growth & Content Strategy, Unmistakable Cre-
ative
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
